title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/03/2026
Dalian iron ore futures strengthened during the morning session before paring gains in the afternoon.The most-traded I2605 contract setiled at 824 RMB per tonne, representing a 0.55% increase from the prior trading day. In the physical market, spot prices increased by approximately 2-5 RMB. Trading houses were relatively active in offering quotations; however, enquiries from steel mills were limited, and their procurement strategies remained cautious, resulting in moderate transaction volumes.
